reviews.title: Disappointing stay
reviews.text:
Stayed in Westin resort UBUD bali for 2 nights. And unfortunately had a disappointing experience. 

Lets get the cons out of the way first. 

Cons:
1) first time i have ever had a hotel not clean my room. I even called the receptionist to make sure to clean my room. But when i came back to the hotel at 10pm at night to my room, nothing was cleaned. My wife and daughter wanted to sleep so i could not even ask to change rooms or have them clean it in the middle of the night. So we had to sleep in the same sheets and use the same towels. I mean this is supposed to be a westin hotel right? Five star quality? Even a 1 star hotel knows to clean your room. Anyways so i complained and i received chocolates (not joking) as compensation. The manager called me later the next day and offered me half a day stay as further compensation (also not joking). I declined as i didnt have any use for half a day stay. I would have just preferred if they cleaned my room like theyre supposed to when i asked to. 

2) low ceilings in hallways.

So the pros:
Kids club was great for my daughter. Clean and big. 

My room was spacious. 

The breakfast wasnt bad. But limited selection 

Would I recommend it? Mmm im not sure. I would definitely check out other hotels first.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Garden View, Balcony

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: We were placed at the connecting room.  The sound proof was terrible. We could hear almost everything that the neighbors did. This is not a homestay and the price is ten times than the homestay price. After I complained, they moved us with 2 options. One, the room that was not a connecting room, but the bathroom smells, and the other one was still a connecting room but no guest on the other room, but no balcony and I believe the room has not been used for so long because covid. The room was dusty r😓, But we took it anyway.. It really ruined our vacation mode to stay in 5 stars hotel. The price for covid price still not as cheap compare what we got. Other than that, the staffs were friendly and food was good.

reviews.title: For a quiet peaceful hotel stay, go elsewhere!
reviews.positives: The property is clean and today and staff are very polite and helpful
reviews.negatives: Stayed in junior suite on 3rd level. The level of noise inside the room due to the peculiar lobby area on 5th floor and on top of the guest rooms, made for loud thuds and furniture being dragged constantly upstairs very unsettling. Loud Chinese vacationers in adjacent rooms ensured sleepless nights. For a five star hotel I expected sound proofed rooms and quiet nites. I want to give this hotel a favorable rating due the staff, but frankly I cannot say I had a peaceful vacation. Pity.

reviews.title: Annoying service delivery quality
reviews.text: This is a hotel with very small ( cannot accommodate enough people) 2 restaurants. The service people are talking to each other most of the time with not much time to serve. Took 18 minutes to get the menu card.. a further 25 minutes to get the Negroni I ordered. When I went to the western restaurant they sent me to the other restaurant saying that they are full while 3 chairs at the long bar were still free. The issues go on and on. I will not visit this place again. Neither will I recommend it to anyone else..
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Warm greetings from The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud.

Thank you for sharing your recent experience with us. We are truly sorry to hear that your visit did not meet expectations, especially regarding the service and restaurant experience. Please accept our sincere apologies for the delays and lack of attentiveness you encountered this is certainly not the standard we strive to uphold.

Your feedback has been shared with our leadership team for immediate follow-up and corrective action. We appreciate your honesty and regret that we missed the opportunity to leave you with a more positive impression.

We hope you’ll consider giving us another chance in the future to provide the seamless and relaxing stay you rightfully expect.

Warm regards,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud

reviews.title: Room with garden almost got broken into
reviews.text:
1) staff do not respond to communications via Agoda platform well. 4. days before the trip, Westin Ubud contacted me via agoda platform asking if I require pick up transfers, and if I do I  should revert on my flight arrival details which i did. No response from Westin and no pick up on day of arrival as well. No apologies. Nothing. 
2) on the last night of the stay, my room glass door was found in this manner as per the picture. Someone had tried to violently open the glass door to access the hotel room, but failed. We called the staff immediately and showed him the situation and was casually brushed off that this may be guests from neighbourimg room who tried to open the door mistakenly . I assured the staff that has little possibility as our swimming suits are hanging at the chairs on the garden. 
3) on the day of the check out, the manager on duty came out again and said that nothing was discovered in the cctv in the surrounding area and this could again be a mistaken situation. 

Looking at the state the door is, and how broken the  secured part and bent the lock is, the guest that they assumed had mistaken that this is his hotel room must have really “mistaken” gravely and strongly.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We sincerely apologize for the shortcomings you experienced, particularly the lack of follow-up regarding your airport transfer request and the absence of communication upon arrival—this is certainly not the standard of service we strive to provide. We are also truly sorry for the distress caused by the incident involving your room door and for the manner in which your concerns were addressed, including the inconsistency in information provided. Please rest assured that we take matters of guest safety and communication very seriously, and your comments have been escalated to our management and security teams for thorough review and follow-up. We appreciate you bringing these issues to our attention and regret that your experience fell short of expectations.

Warm regards,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
We stayed here for 2 nights. Booked 2 rooms. One for a friend and one for me and my 2 year old boy. First night my 2 year old and I couldn’t sleep as we were put in a room close to the highway so all we heard was trucks and bikes beeping and driving all night. The following day I asked to be moved to another room and they didn’t have any other rooms with king size beds so they gave us 2 double beds which I was little concerned about that my 2 year old would fall out.  Due to our disruptive sleep the night before my baby boys  sleep pattern was completely off so he wouldn’t go down for his nap time. I had requested for a late check out due to the inconveniences and the lady at reception said 3:00 was the latest. I thanked her and really encouraged my toddler to sleep before that time. Usually he  goes down for nap time between 12-1 but on the day of checkout he didn’t get down for his nap until 3:00pm so I called the reception and said can I please have an extra hour because my baby just fell asleep and the lady said she spoke with management and they said they would charge me half day rate if we don’t check out by 3:00PM.  

I asked if they were fully booked? And they said no, and I mentioned about my disappointment on the sleepless night due to traffic noise and this subsequently affected my sons sleep pattern, but all she said was sorry for the inconvenience. So I had to wake my boy up earlier from his nap and leave.   I’m a little disappointed in the service and understanding. . Definitely got a good place to stay if you’re super sensitive to noise from the road.  Ask for a quieter room closer to the pool view. 
Besides that the restaurant manager Robert was very friendly and nice. He would go out of his way to make a green juice for me and he was very kind and thoughtful. Had great sense of humour

reviews.title: A good and comfortable hotel for a short stay in Ubud, but not ideal if you are looking for peace and quiet to truly rel
reviews.positives: The hotel is functional and well maintained, with a very friendly and attentive staff. Everyone was especially kind and helpful, from the restaurant team to the pool service, which was excellent. The pool area was definitely one of the highlights, with beautiful views and a very relaxing atmosphere. The location of the hotel is also very good.
reviews.negatives:
The main downside is that it is not a quiet place to rest. The room doors are very noisy and every time someone closes a door, it makes a loud bang that can wake you up. The hallway noise makes it difficult to sleep properly, which is a significant issue that the hotel should address.

The Kids Club is also very limited and mainly oriented towards very young children, with only one staff member and rather basic activities.

In addition, the dining options are somewhat limited, with only one or two restaurants. However, the breakfast service stands out positively, with very attentive staff and a good variety of options.

reviews.title: There are many ambiguous parts when it comes to recommending accommodations.
reviews.text: After reading the reviews, I decided to stay, but after actually spending two days there, I realized it just wasn’t the right accommodation for me. If you only consider aspects like the facilities and the friendliness of the staff, it might be a good choice. I booked it expecting it to be quiet since it’s located away from the center of Ubud. In conclusion, for someone like me who is sensitive to noise, it became a source of stress that didn’t get resolved even after changing rooms. The accommodation has a fatal flaw with motorcycle noise and connecting rooms, so I could hear everything from the next room. For me, where a good night’s sleep is important, it was a place where changing rooms didn’t solve the problem. I liked the pool view and breakfast, but I don’t think I will visit again. There are many Chinese tourists, and their high-pitched voices can make it truly noisy, making it impossible to sleep if you’re in the next room.

발리 우붓 웨스틴 리조트 & 스파에서 따뜻한 인사를 드립니다.

reviews.title: Weekend Getaway
reviews.text:
We made a spontaneous decision to take a vacation and ended up booking the larger suite—the only room available at the time.  While beautifully appointed and spacious, it felt a bit excessive (and pricey) for just the two of us.

The resort itself is tucked away in a serene, secluded location, which is perfect if you’re planning to stay put and unwind.  However, do factor in the travel time to Ubud centre—traffic can stretch the journey to 30–45 minutes, which made excursions a bit of a commitment.

On the upside, the food at Tall Trees restaurant was a standout. Every meal was a delight, and the setting added to the experience.

Overall, it’s a lovely place to recharge, especially if you’re looking for quiet luxury and don’t mind being a little off the beaten path.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We’re glad you enjoyed the spacious suite, our serene location, and especially the delightful dining at Tall Trees restaurant. 

We hope to welcome you back whenever you wish to recharge in a peaceful setting.

Warm regards

reviews.title: Overall Very Good Stay!
reviews.positives:
Everything was just perfect from check-in to check-out. The location was beautiful, and the view from our balcony was simply stunning.

The welcoming and cooperative staff made all the difference. The level of service we received was outstanding, and we truly appreciated the personal attention provided by Mr. Agus and the Restaurant Manager. It was evident that the team is dedicated to ensuring guests feel comfortable and valued.

The cleanliness throughout the property was also impressive. We felt very special , during our entire visit due to the unparalleled attention from the staff.

Thank you for making our stay so memorable. We look forward to returning in the future!
reviews.negatives: We had booked our stay with Dinner and there was a bit of confusion, however it was addressed by Hotel professionally.

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.text: The room is spacious and the toilet is very large.    Overall, it is very clean. We had a little problem with our toilet at the beginning. There was no shampoo and the drainage had some issues. When we approached the front desk to inform them, they rectified it almost immediately when we were out shopping.   Our flight home was at 9 pm the next day. We asked for late checkout and to our surprise they actually extended it to 4 pm without extra charges. This is the first time a hotel ever extends our checkout till 4 pm.  We are very thankful.  Also, I wanted a massage but they were all fully booked at the hotel for the night.  Viana actually took the time to look for one at another hotel for us and arranged transport as well. The guest relationship manager also took time to find out from us if the earlier problems were resolved and if our stay was okay. Overall, I would say the service is excellent. Although the location is slightly away from the shopping area but I think if one is looking for peace and tranquility, this is a better place. The breakfast is also one of the best with many healthy choices.  I will certainly stay at Westin the next time I come back to Bali.

The room matched with the descriptions detail, food (in room service was tasty and good), but it needs more variety of menu when it comes to breakfast (3days breakfast in a row with almost same menu in restaurant is quite boring).

The pool has a great view, but too bad we need to have a quick wash and clothes changing in a spa shower (usually washroom provided near to the pool). 

The spa was good, the ambience was nice, the room smells good. The kids club quite interesting for kids. 

Thanks Westin Ubud and staffs, would love to be back again next time and explore more.

소중한 투숙 후기를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 넓은 객실과 조용한 환경, 그리고 저희 직원들의 친절함을 좋게 봐주셔서 기쁘게 생각합니다.
주변 식당이 많지 않은 점에 대한 아쉬움도 공감하며, 향후 더 나은 경험을 드릴 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.

또 뵐 수 있는 날을 기다리겠습니다.

따뜻한 마음으로,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali

reviews.title: The best accommodation offering excellent hospitality and clean rooms.
reviews.text: I had a pleasant stay thanks to the staff who always greeted us with warm smiles throughout our stay. True to its global brand, the service was of high quality, and the room conditions were at their best. Given that the resort/hotel is surrounded by jungle, it is inevitable to encounter many insects, but surprisingly, I wasn't bitten by any mosquitoes and had a comfortable stay without any inconveniences. They provide free photo shooting coupons for guests, and I highly recommend taking advantage of this! Thanks to Mr. Andra, the photographer from the Photo Leisure team, I took some lovely photos with my mom. He directed us to pose naturally, so I loved all the pictures. Additionally, I want to express my gratitude to Mr. Nara, who checked on us daily to see if we had any inconveniences and took care of us until our departure.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We’re delighted to hear that our team’s warm hospitality, comfortable room condition, and overall service made your stay truly pleasant. It’s wonderful to know that you enjoyed the tranquil jungle setting without any discomfort and that the complimentary photo shoot became a memorable highlight of your visit. Your kind words about Mr. Andra from our Photo Leisure team and Mr. Nara are truly appreciated, and we will be sure to share your compliments with them. We’re grateful for your recommendation and look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali

The welcome greeting upon arrival was also very warm and pleasant.

They even had a running program, and I really liked the course around the hotel. Overall, it exceeded my expectations in every way, and I was very satisfied! The room was incredibly spacious, and the bathroom was large and spotlessly clean. Although it’s slightly far from Ubud city center, taking a taxi to get there wasn’t an issue at all. I’d love to stay here again when I visit Ubud next time!

reviews.title: Indonesian hospitality at its best
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at Westin Ubud hotel with my significant other, and I have to say, the staff's hospitality made our getaway absolutely perfect.

From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel welcome and special. Their warm and friendly demeanour made us feel like we were more than just guests, but like we were part of their family.

Throughout our stay, the staff went above and beyond to make sure that we had everything we needed to enjoy our time together. We cannot single out any staff for their great service as everyone was very welcoming and friendly.

Overall, I cannot say enough good things about the staff at this hotel. Their hospitality truly made our stay unforgettable, and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and welcoming experience.

reviews.title: Thank you
reviews.text:
I travel to Bali every year. During my last trip to Ubud, I stayed at Padma Ubud, but because it’s a bit far from the town center, I chose The Westin Ubud this time, as it seemed to offer a similar environment. I wanted to share both the things I appreciated and the things I found a bit disappointing during my 3-night stay.

On the day of check-in, there was a burning smell in the air from something being incinerated in the neighborhood around the resort. Since one of the main reasons for choosing a jungle resort in Ubud is the fresh air and natural surroundings, it was disappointing that I couldn’t open the windows. Of course, this wasn’t The Westin Ubud’s fault, and fortunately the air was much better the next day.

The good part of my stay was the kindness of several staff members. In particular, Era (Devindasari) was truly caring when my child wasn’t feeling well. She told me that if my child couldn’t eat, the kitchen could prepare porridge, and even after we returned from the hospital and my child had recovered, she checked in again the next day to make sure everything was okay. Her sincerity touched me deeply, and thanks to her—more than any other service—I felt that I’d like to stay at The Westin Ubud again on my next trip.

Africa and Ayu, thank you as well. Actually, I used to be a Westin associate myself, and I was genuinely moved by your service. Wishing all of you good health and happiness.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We are pleased to hear that our team made your visit more comfortable—particularly when your child was unwell. Your kind words mean a lot to us..

We’re sorry for the burning smell you encountered on your first day. Although it was beyond our control, we understand how this may have affected your initial impression.

As a former Westin associate, your recognition of our service truly means a great deal. We appreciate your warm wishes and hope your child is now fully recovered.

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next trip to Ubud.

Warm regards,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali Team

reviews.title: The Best Honeymoon Experience
reviews.text:
My wife and I stayed at The Westin Ubud for our honeymoon, and it was truly an unforgettable experience. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with the soothing sounds of traditional Balinese instruments, which instantly set the tone for a magical stay. We were also offered refreshing welcome drinks that made us feel immediately relaxed and appreciated.

The service was exceptional from start to finish. Every member of the staff — from the receptionist to the restaurant team and even the chef was warm, kind, and genuinely attentive. Their hospitality made us feel special every single day.

The room was luxurious, clean, and beautifully designed. We received complimentary snacks daily, which was a thoughtful touch we truly appreciated. The breakfast buffet was excellent with a wide variety of delicious options, and the pool area was serene and perfect for relaxing.

One of the highlights was the stunning lobby, elegant and beautifully decorated, it truly captured the essence of Balinese luxury.

Overall, this was one of the best hotel experiences we’ve ever had. The Westin Ubud exceeded our expectations in every way. Highly recommended for couples, especially those celebrating a honeymoon or any special occasion.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Warmest greetings from The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali.

Thank you for your thoughtful review. We're truly pleased to hear that you enjoyed our warm welcome, the comfort of your spacious room, and the serene views of the surrounding forest. It brings us great joy to know that your experience with our service team was memorable.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another peaceful forest-side retreat.

Warm regards,
The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali

Be Well,
The Westin Ubud Team

reviews.title: The best accommodation in Ubud, Bali!
reviews.text:
The hotel is very clean and tidy, and there are friendly staff members available to provide guidance everywhere. On the night of my check-in, I lost my bag in the restaurant before realizing it. The staff called me to let me know to retrieve it, which contained my important documents and money. I am really grateful to the hotel staff for helping me recover it without any damage; I truly wouldn't know how to continue my journey without you. 

The hotel offers a lot of interesting activities, but remember to make reservations in advance. We took our kids to participate in a nature tour, craft-making, and traditional Balinese service, and the staff were all very friendly and helpful. The activities were also well arranged with a focus on children's experiences; our family had a lot of fun. Thanks again to the hotel!

We booked a room that included breakfast, and the meals were exquisite and diverse, allowing us to enjoy Bali's specialty dishes. The next day, the chef even made my child delicate fruit pancakes and served a plate of her favorite strawberries, which was truly surprising! 

At check-out, a staff member even gifted my child a little bear, which has now become her best friend. I am very grateful to everyone 😆. When we visit Bali again, we will definitely come back!
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool View, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
We're here to celebrate our birthdays and wedding anniversary, and our experience has been nothing short of impressive. We informed the hotel about the occasion, and the warm welcome we received exceeded our expectations. The hotel staff even surprised us with lovely little treats throughout our stay. Every member of the staff took great care of us, and the food served here is simply outstanding. It is a reflection of their dedication and passion for the culinary arts, as evident in the taste and presentation of each dish. Even the wine selection was superbly curated and served.

Lastly, we would like to express our heartfelt gratitude to all the staff for their warm welcome and exceptional service extended to both me and my wife. If we ever return to Bali, this hotel will definitely be our top choice.

reviews.title: Очень уютный и приветливый отель.
reviews.positives:
Очень приветливый и отзывчивый персонал, везде. Приветливость и улыбки повсюду. Хороший ресторан, все вкусно. Очень приветливо встречают в любой части отеля: от ресепшена до бассейна. Сам отель расположен на краю ущелья, очень красивый вид на джунгли, вечерами орут цикады,  классно))) красивая территория, кролики ручные гуляют по утрам. 
Помогают с экскурсиями, оба раза посоветовали и организовали все для нас, все очень понравилось.
reviews.negatives:
Нужно все-ткаи отмыть пол в душевой, где льётся вода постоянно - там нормально, возле двери скользко. 
И странно застилают постель: зачем-то ещё одна простынь под одеялом, ночью все это комками,  пол ночи не спишь, а расправляешь обратно. 
Но это мелочи и придирки. Все хорошо.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Рядом дорога, часть номеров выходит непосредственно на эту дорогу. Она очень нагружена. Мы при заселении поменяли несколько номеров «с видом на сад» - это не на сад, а на дорогу. Причем, на первом этаже балкон выглядит кринжово - с решеткой, нет ощущения, что ты в спа отеле, другие ассоциации совсем. Хотя, сам номер красивый и просторный.

В номере огромная кровать с нежнейшим постельный бельём, огромные мягкие махровые полотенца, вкусные средства для душа. Много разных мелочей, например кладут перед сном масло лаванды. Сервис супер внимательный. В этом отеле действительно отдыхаешь и расслабляешься, кругом красота и роскошь. Из бассейна даже никуда уходить не хочется. Вам никакие клубы с бассейнами не нужны будут, так как бассейн в Вестине просто произведение искусства. Это маленький рай, в который хочется вернуться
